achievements.description: Meet the space crew and be transported to the starship Calnus

achievements.description: Be joined by Ilia after a wild trip through space-time

achievements.description: Successfully enter Portmith

achievements.description: Receive a reward from Ruddle in Portmith

achievements.description: Deliver the Statue to Badam in Haute

achievements.description: Recruit Cyuss as a permanent member of the party

achievements.description: Defeat the Valkhent Chief and end the pirating terror

achievements.description: Defeat the Velkhent Chief in the Pirates' Hideout without using any special arts

achievements.description: Rescue the Catgirl and pick up her Ocarina

achievements.description: Receive the Saint Elmo's Charm from the Blue-eyed Boy on the Portmith Docks

achievements.description: Find a way to get to Autanim

achievements.description: Defeat Darthwidow in the Astral Caves after learning the truth

achievements.description: Defeat Darthwidow in the Astral Caves without using any fire elemental special arts or curing petrify ailment

achievements.description: Defeat the Spirit Wolves in the Purgatorium without using any healing abilities

achievements.description: Clear the monsters off of Mt. Eckdart for Foster

achievements.description: Defeat Peryton in the Labyrinth of Champions without using any fire elemental abilities or curing paralysis ailment

achievements.description: Visit the isolated village of Durss outside of Silvalant before the demon assault

achievements.description: Be rejoined by Millie after the mix-up at the Time Gate

achievements.description: Complete the Muah Castle Treasury

achievements.description: Loot all Luxurious Weapons in the Castle Treasury and use your skills to not return any of them at the end

achievements.description: Defeat Arachmene and repel the demonic assault
